package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
    var A, B int
    fmt.Scanln(&A)
    fmt.Scanln(&B)
    fmt.Println(A + B)
    fmt.Println(A - B)
    fmt.Println(A * B)
    fmt.Printf("%.2f\n", float64(A)/float64(B))
    fmt.Println(A % B)
}
